# [OptionTypeComparator](<OptionTypeComparator$.html> "Go to companion")

####  class OptionTypeComparator[A] extends TypeComparator[Option[A]]

Comparator for Option values. Note that None is lesser than any Some values.

Annotations
     @Internal()
